subcodes.first_line: The veils of idle fancy have covered the hearts of humankind. Blessed is he who hath rent them asunder through the power of certitude. The Herald hath raised His call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد غطت حجبات الاوهام قلوب الانام طوبی لقوی خرقها بقوه الیقین قد نادی المناد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
